pages.text: Olwethu wants to play pretend. “I want to fly like a bird, swim like a mermaid, roar like a lion,” she tells Gogo. But Gogo says, “Not now, Olwethu. It’s time to go to school.”

blocks.text: Olwethu wants to play pretend.
“I want to fly like a bird, swim like a mermaid, roar like a lion,” she tells Gogo.
But Gogo says, “Not now, Olwethu. It’s time to go to school.”

pages.text: STOMP! STOMP! Olwethu’s feet go as she walks slowly to school. But what is this? There’s a door, covered in feathers. Olwethu walks up to it and…

blocks.text: STOMP! STOMP! Olwethu’s feet go as she walks slowly to school.
But what is this?
There’s a door, covered in feathers.
Olwethu walks up to it and…

pages.text: WHOOSH! Olwethu is a bird in the sky!

pages.text: “GRRRRRRRRR!” She opens her mouth and… Olwethu is a lion in the savannah.

pages.text: “ROOOAAARRRR!” Her voice is loud and powerful. But what is this? There’s door, covered another with photos of her friends. She prowls over, holds up her paw, and…

blocks.text: “ROOOAAARRRR!” Her voice is loud and powerful. But what is this?
There’s door, covered another with photos of her friends.
She prowls over, holds up her paw, and…

pages.text: WHIZZ! Olwethu is herself again. She’s in her classroom with her friends.

blocks.text: WHIZZ! Olwethu is herself again.
She’s in her classroom with her friends.

pages.text: Teacher Songelwa says, “HMMMMMM... ...where have you been, Olwethu?”

blocks.text: Teacher Songelwa says, “HMMMMMM...
...where have you been, Olwethu?”
“WOW! Teacher, I’ve been everywhere!”
